testcase.name: validate

failure.message: 1 expectation failed. Expected header "Connection" was not "keep-slive", was "keep-alive". Headers are: Date=Wed, 03 Jun 2026 08:17:49 GMT Content-Type=application/json; charset=utf-8 Transfer-Encoding=chunked Connection=keep-alive access-control-allow-origin=* etag=W/"2990-lZ2o94A2EDKiYW3/6/3oI74HHkw" x-powered-by=Express cf-cache-status=DYNAMIC Nel={"report_to":"cf-nel","success_fraction":0.0,"max_age":604800} Report-To={"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://a.nel.cloudflare.com/report/v4?s=4XR2JP%2FvFPA5Hw9I3b2ya%2BqqtbiNsV1eKuqiOYzBriXjpiKjxfXbzF9Tx7J1kbGSg2XVSWG00Dp13tB5BLJ3nI3UNDfdY%2ByfSJ5GjrBR1%2BmrdsPbpU9am2ICZvqwZFxKws5Y"}]} Content-Encoding=gzip Server=cloudflare CF-RAY=a05d4378b9d28746-SIN alt-svc=h3=":443"; ma=86400

testcase.failure:
